occurrence_sentence: Oxford Instruments Plasma Technology Ltd. has joined its parent company, Oxford Instruments plc, as an industry partner of the Quantum Foundry at the University of California, Santa Barbara (UCSB), according to a news release.

occurrence_sentence: "Oxford Instruments is delighted to be part of such a strong consortium at UCSB and to support the development of robust quantum device fabrication processes for applications in computing, communications," said Ravi Sundaram, head of strategic R&D markets for Oxford Instruments.
